title: Concrete Calculator Yards - How Much Do You Need
description: Free concrete calculator in cubic yards. Calculate how much concrete you need for slabs, footings, columns, and walls. Includes waste factor.
keywords: concrete calculator yards, cubic yards concrete, concrete slab calculator, how much concrete, concrete volume calculator
intro: Calculate how many cubic yards of concrete you need for your project. Enter dimensions for slabs, footings, or columns.

faq.q: How do I calculate cubic yards of concrete?
faq.a: Cubic yards = (Length ft × Width ft × Depth ft) / 27. There are 27 cubic feet in one cubic yard.

faq.q: How much does a yard of concrete cost?
faq.a: Concrete typically costs $120-$150 per cubic yard for ready-mix delivery, varying by location and type.
Yes, order 5-10% extra to account for waste, spillage, and uneven subgrade. It's better to have slightly too much than too little.
